Book a CourtNew to Pickleball?
Play Video

Find your
best play!

Located in Middleton, MA and Rye, NH, New England Pickleball Club is a community where every player belongs. We prioritize fairness and obsess about the quality of our courts, coaches, and matchmaking. Whether you’re looking for social or competitive games, you’ll find your best play at NEPC.

Looking to Join?
Book a Court

Four ways to play – even if you’re not a member.

Book a private court

When you want to play or drill with your own friend group, it’s simple to reserve your own court time.

Book

Social events

Theme nights, member socials, glow pickleball, and club events live in one easy place.

Events

Join a competitive league or team tournament

Weekly leagues and team tournaments give competitive players a clear place to find the right format.

Join Us

Take a class or lesson

Want to improve? Our academy offers group clinics and private lessons with our teaching pros.

Register
Events & Parties

Social events, parties, and corporate outings.

View Social Events

Social Events

Theme nights, member socials, World Cup parties, Latin Night, 80s Night, and monthly glow pickleball.

Parties & Corporate Events

Private parties, corporate outings, team-building events, and custom group pickleball.

Club News & Updates

80s Night

A themed social night with music, rotating play, and a different feel from a standard open-play block.
Read more

3.0-3.5 MLP Team Event

Middleton team-format event for 3.0-3.5 players, targeted for Saturday July 18th.
Read more

2.5-3.0 MLP Team Event

Middleton team-format event for 2.5-3.0 players, targeted for Saturday July 25th.
Read more

4th of July Socials

Holiday-themed social play for members and guests who want structured games around the July 4th week.
